title: CFIHOS V2.0 Data Model
description: Capital Facilities Information Handover Standard (CFIHOS) Version 2.0 â Reference data model for asset information handover in the oil & gas industry. Published by IOGP.

cfihos.title: CFIHOS V2.0
cfihos.description: The complete CFIHOS V2.0 reference data model â 144 tables covering tag classes, equipment classes, properties, units of measure, source standards, and document requirements.

application_condition.title: APPLICATION CONDITION
application_condition.description: A condition on a property value that controls when a property or document requirement applies (e.g. "when design pressure > 100 bar").

application_condition_group.title: APPLICATION CONDITION GROUP
application_condition_group.description: A named group of application conditions combined with logical AND/OR.

application_condition_group_member.title: APPLICATION CONDITION GROUP MEMBER
application_condition_group_member.description: Members of an application condition group.

discipline.title: DISCIPLINE
discipline.description: Engineering disciplines (e.g. Mechanical, Electrical, Instrumentation) used to categorise documents.

discipline_document_type.title: DISCIPLINE DOCUMENT TYPE
discipline_document_type.description: Defines which document types are required for each discipline, with asset type, format, and review requirements.

discipline_document_type_handover_requir.title: DISCIPLINE DOCUMENT TYPE HANDOVER REQUIREMENT

required_document_status_for_the_handove.title: Required document status for the handover event

discipline_document_type_handover_requir.description: Specifies the required document status for each discipline/document type at each handover event.

document_and_data_requirement_group_code.title: Document and data requirement group code

document_and_data_requirement_group_name.title: Document and data requirement group name

document_and_data_requirement_type_code.title: Document and data requirement type code

document_and_data_requirement_type_descr.title: Document and data requirement type description

document_revision.title: DOCUMENT REVISION
document_revision.description: Document revision records (operational data â empty in reference model).

document_type.title: DOCUMENT TYPE
document_type.description: Types of engineering documents (e.g. Datasheet, Drawing, Certificate). Classified by document type classification.

entity.title: ENTITY
entity.description: Data dictionary entities â the logical objects defined in the CFIHOS information model.

entity_attribute_relationship.title: ENTITY_ATTRIBUTE_RELATIONSHIP
entity_attribute_relationship.description: Relationships between entities and their attributes, including mandatory/optional status.

equipment.title: EQUIPMENT
equipment.description: Individual equipment instances (operational data â empty in reference model).

equipment_class.title: EQUIPMENT CLASS
equipment_class.description: Defines the classification hierarchy for physical equipment. Mirrors the tag class structure for the physical/equipment domain.

property_relevant_for_model_part_indicat.title: Property relevant for model / part indicator

reason_for_deviating_from_standard_unit_.title: Reason for deviating from standard unit of measure

handover_event.title: HANDOVER EVENT
handover_event.description: Project lifecycle events at which documents must be handed over (e.g. Mechanical Completion, Final Acceptance).

reason_for_deviating_from_standard_unit_.title: Reason for deviating from standard unit of measure

non_abstract_tag_or_equipment_class.title: NON ABSTRACT TAG OR EQUIPMENT CLASS

process_stream_property_value_in_case.title: Process stream property value in case

property.title: PROPERTY
property.description: Master list of all properties (attributes) that can be assigned to tag or equipment classes. Includes data type, unit of measure dimension, and picklist reference.

property_group.title: PROPERTY GROUP
property_group.description: Groups of properties for organisational purposes, forming a hierarchy via parent_group_code.

property_picklist.title: PROPERTY PICKLIST
property_picklist.description: Named picklists for qualitative properties that have a fixed set of allowed values.

property_picklist_value.title: PROPERTY PICKLIST VALUE
property_picklist_value.description: Individual values within each property picklist.

property_picklist_value_source_standard.title: PROPERTY PICKLIST VALUE SOURCE STANDARD
property_picklist_value_source_standard.description: Links picklist values to the source standards that define them.

property_to_group_assignment.title: PROPERTY TO GROUP ASSIGNMENT
property_to_group_assignment.description: Assigns properties to property groups for a specific tag/equipment class and grouping purpose.

purchase_order_item_initial_expected_del.title: Purchase order item initial expected delivery date

purchase_order_item_latest_revised_deliv.title: Purchase order item latest revised delivery date

purchase_order_item_event_original_estim.title: Purchase order item event original estimated date

purchase_order_item_event_latest_revised.title: Purchase order item event latest revised date

purchase_order_item_for_model_part.title: PURCHASE ORDER ITEM FOR MODEL PART

purchase_order_item_vendor_document_and_.title: PURCHASE ORDER ITEM VENDOR DOCUMENT AND DATA REQUIREMENT

purchase_order_vendor_document_and_data_.title: Purchase order vendor document and data requirement number

source_standard_document_and_data_requir.title: Source standard document and data requirement number

source_standard.title: SOURCE STANDARD

source_standard_still_to_be_completed_in.title: Source standard still to be completed indicator

source_standard.description: Reference list of all source standards (e.g. ISO, IEC, JIP33 specifications) referenced in the data model.

source_standard_document_and_data_requir.title: SOURCE STANDARD DOCUMENT AND DATA REQUIREMENT

default_issue_for_review_number_of_weeks.title: Default issue for review number of weeks

default_issue_for_approval_number_of_wee.title: Default issue for approval number of weeks

default_for_information_number_of_weeks.title: Default for information number of weeks

source_standard_document_and_data_requir.title: Source standard document and data requirement number
Source standard document and data requirement title
Source standard document and data requirement description
Source standard document and data requirement comment

document_and_data_requirement_type_code.title: Document and data requirement type code

document_and_data_requirement_group_code.title: Document and data requirement group code

default_issue_for_review_reference_date.title: Default issue for review reference date

default_issue_for_approval_reference_dat.title: Default issue for approval reference date

source_standard_document_and_data_requir.description: Document and data requirements defined by each source standard â what documents must be produced, when, and in what format.

source_standard_document_and_data_requir.title: SOURCE STANDARD DOCUMENT AND DATA REQUIREMENT CONDITION
Source standard document and data requirement_number

spare_part_interchangeability_record_com.title: SPARE PART INTERCHANGEABILITY RECORD COMMERCIAL DETAILS

purchase_quantity_unit_of_measure_name.title: Purchase quantity unit of measure name

quoted_delivery_time_unit_of_measure_nam.title: Quoted delivery time unit of measure name

submission_reference_is_after_event_type.title: Submission reference is after event type indicator

tag.title: TAG
tag.description: Individual tag instances within a plant (operational data â empty in reference model).

tag_class.title: TAG CLASS

equipment_expected_to_be_installed_indic.title: Equipment expected to be installed indicator

tag_or_equipment_class_existence_reason_.title: Tag or equipment class existence reason description

tag_class.description: Defines the classification hierarchy for tags (functional objects) in a plant. Each tag class can have a parent, forming a tree structure.

tag_class_equipment_class_relationship.title: TAG CLASS EQUIPMENT CLASS RELATIONSHIP

tag_or_equipment_class_relationship_reas.title: Tag or equipment class relationship reason for mapping

tag_class_equipment_class_relationship.description: Maps tag classes to their corresponding equipment classes, defining which physical equipment is expected for a functional tag.

tag_class_property.title: TAG CLASS PROPERTY
tag_class_property.description: Assigns properties to tag classes with their standard SI and Imperial units of measure.

tag_or_equipment_class.title: TAG OR EQUIPMENT CLASS

equipment_expected_to_be_installed_indic.title: Equipment expected to be installed indicator

parent_tag_or_equipment_class_name.title: Parent tag or equipment class name

tag_or_equipment_class_existence_reason_.title: Tag or equipment class existence reason description

tag_or_equipment_class.description: Unified view of both tag classes and equipment classes. The central class hierarchy table of the CFIHOS model.

tag_or_equipment_class_decomposition_pur.title: Tag or equipment class decomposition purpose code

component_role_tag_or_equipment_class_na.title: Component role tag or equipment class name

tag_or_equipment_class_minimum_number_of.title: Tag or equipment class minimum number of components

tag_or_equipment_class_maximum_number_of.title: Tag or equipment class maximum number of components

tag_or_equipment_class_typical_number_of.title: Tag or equipment class typical number of components

tag_or_equipment_class_component_to_be_a.title: Tag or equipment class component to be added indicator

tag_or_equipment_class_property.title: TAG OR EQUIPMENT CLASS PROPERTY

property_is_relevant_for_tag_indicator.title: Property is relevant for tag indicator

property_relevant_for_model_part_indicat.title: Property relevant for model / part indicator

tag_or_equipment_class_property.description: Combined property assignments for tag and equipment classes.

tag_or_equipment_class_property_applicat.title: TAG OR EQUIPMENT CLASS PROPERTY APPLICATION CONDITION

tag_or_equipment_class_property_source_s.title: TAG OR EQUIPMENT CLASS PROPERTY SOURCE STANDARD
tag_or_equipment_class_property_source_s.description: Links each class property to the source standard (e.g. JIP33) that requires it, with section reference and property name in that standard.

tag_or_equipment_class_source_standard.title: TAG OR EQUIPMENT CLASS SOURCE STANDARD
tag_or_equipment_class_source_standard.description: Links tag/equipment classes to the source standards that apply to them, optionally conditioned by an application condition group.

tag_or_equipment_class_synonym_name.title: Tag or equipment class synonym name

reason_for_deviating_from_standard_unit_.title: Reason for deviating from standard unit of measure

unit_of_measure.title: UNIT OF MEASURE
unit_of_measure.description: All units of measure used in the model, with symbol, measurement system, and UNECE code.

unit_of_measure_dimension.title: UNIT OF MEASURE DIMENSION
unit_of_measure_dimension.description: Physical dimensions (e.g. Length, Pressure, Temperature) that units of measure belong to.

unit_of_measure_dimension_application.title: UNIT OF MEASURE DIMENSION APPLICATION
unit_of_measure_dimension_application.description: Maps each unit of measure to its applicable physical dimensions.

application_condition_group_code_cfihos_.title: application condition group code CFIHOS unique id

application_condition_code_cfihos_unique.title: application condition code CFIHOS unique id

xfix_tag_equipment_class_property_source.title: xFIX TAG EQUIPMENT CLASS PROPERTY SOURCE
